name: HRT_DEVELOPMENT_ACTIVITIES
description: This table stores skill development activities information.

columns.Name: DEVELOPMENT_ACTIVITY_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRT_PROFILES_B table.

columns.Name: OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the primary key of the object involved in the development activity.

columns.Name: OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Stores the object type involved in the development activity. Lookup type - ORA_HRT_DEV_ACTIVITY_OBJECT_TYPE

columns.Name: CONTENT_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRT_CONTENT_ITEMS_B table

columns.Name: SKILL
columns.Comments: This column stores the name of the skill

columns.Name: SKILL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS table.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores the status of development activity. Lookup type - ORA_HRT_DEVELOPMENT_ACTIVITY

columns.Name: RATING_LEVEL_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the rating level associated to development activity

columns.Name: RATING_MODEL_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the rating model used in the development activity rating.

columns.Name: COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date on which development activity is completed

columns.Name: SKILL_SCORE_CONFIG_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRT_SKILLS_SCORE_CONFIG table.

columns.Name: CUSTOM_SCORE
columns.Comments: Stores custom score value if any development activity overrides the default score from score configuration.

columns.Name: EXPIRY_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores expiry date

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
